_provenance: schema-derived from alpha_bot_execution.py triggered=True side-effect block (lines 1072-1132) and AC-V3.2 observational-only requirement. No producer-computed floats. Reason strings match the trigger priority table in alpha_bot_execution.py:819-831.
description: Fixture for AC-V3.2: when fleet_correlation_alert trips, all individual symphony trigger side-effects must still fire normally. The alert is observational — it must NOT gate or modify any trigger dispatch.
invariant: fleet_correlation_alert in bot_state does NOT appear in the condition chain that gates any of the above side-effects. The alert key is written AFTER side-effects complete, not before.
